name: @fora/sync-plane-job
description: FORA Sync Plane nightly cron worker (FORA-438 / FORA-406). Walks `sync.divergence_queue` once per day, emits `sync.backfill.completed` per tenant, and feeds the FORA-204 daily drift report. Pure-Python entry point (`python -m agents.sync_plane_service.nightly_cron`); this package is the k8s CronJob / orchestrator registration surface.

scripts.smoke: python3 -c "from agents.sync_plane_service.nightly_cron import run_nightly_scan, register_cron; from agents.sync_plane_service.schema import DivergenceEntry; from agents.sync_plane_service.audit_forwarder import InMemoryAuditForwarder; r = run_nightly_scan(entries=[], forwarder=InMemoryAuditForwarder()); print('nightly_cron smoke ok:', r.snapshot_fingerprint[:32])"
scripts.register: python3 -c "from agents.sync_plane_service.nightly_cron import register_cron; import json; print(json.dumps(register_cron(), indent=2))"
